.parametrize("user_id", ["u_2"])
def test_fetch_user_ mock_db, auth_client):
    resp = auth_client.get(f"/api/v1/users/{user_id}/notifications    assert resp.status_code == 200
    assert resp.json()["id"] == user_id
    assert mock_db.fetch.call_count == 1
